subject: Possible GRB030110b seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
03-01-10 at 16:33:03 UT. The duration of the GRB is very short at
approx. 0.2s. No position information is available. The lightcurve 
is available at
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-10T16-33-03.0000-00000-00000.lc
